titleStmt.title: SII 34.8: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 8. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Udvāhanāthasvāmin temple.

summary.p: Unfinished. Seems to record a tax-free gift of land by the mahāsabhā of Gaṅgaikoṇḍa chōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, to the temple of Tirumaṇañjēri-uḍaiya-Mahādēva. Details lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmātu puṇara puvi
mātu viḷaṅka jaya
mātu mala p pa
tu malar mannavar cūṭa man
niya Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi
cūṭi ceṅkōl cenṟu ticai to
ṟu vaḷarpa veṅkali nīṅki me
yyaṟantaḻaippak kaliṅkamiriya ka
ṭa malainaṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi va
raiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru
kuṭai niḻaṟṟi vīrasiṅṅāsanattu
mukkōṟkiḻānaṭikaḷōṭum vīṟṟiru
ntaruḷiya kōpparakēcari paṟmarāna ca
ti śrīvikkiramacōḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu
5- tu virutarājapayaṅkara vaḷanā
ṭṭuk kuṟukkai nāṭṭu kaṅkaikoṇ
ṭa cōḻaccatuṟpēti maṅkalattu sabhai
kku camainta Ālikkonṟai śrītarapaṭṭanum
kuravacēri Aruḷāḷapaṭṭanum kuṇṭūr tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭanum
Uṟuppuṭṭur tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭanum
kāvali nanti perumālai kāsiranum pākaḷūr
kūtta paṭṭanum Uḷḷiṭṭa māhasabhaiyōm
Ivvūr tirumaṇañcēri Uṭaiya māhādeva
ṟku nāṅkaḷ cantirātittavaṟ Iṟaiyili
Digital edition of SII 34.8 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
